case_title: CHRIS SHUMATE VS. AMY GIN H. CHOW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, AMY GIN H. AKA: AMY GIN WAK CHOW;  AKA: AMY GINH CHO CHOW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, AMY GIN H. AKA: AMY GIN WAK CHOW;  AKA: AMY GINH CHO CHOW

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHUMATE, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, AMY GIN H. AKA: AMY GIN WAK CHOW;  AKA: AMY GINH CHO CHOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHUMATE, CHRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, AMY GIN H. AKA: AMY GIN WAK CHOW;  AKA: AMY GINH CHO CHOW $7,489.47 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,623.97, THE COURT DETERMINES THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE TO BE $7500.00. AFTER CREDIT FOR TAXES AND REGISTRATION REFUND, AMD REDUCTION FOR SALVAGE, THE NET JUDGMENT IS $7489.47. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGEMNT FOR THE PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $5880.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
